name: tinfer-realtime-highlight-electron
description: Electron example for Tinfer streaming TTS with realtime spoken-word highlighting.

scripts.check: ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron --check main.js && ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron --check preload.js && ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron --check renderer.js && ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron --check playback.js && ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron --check catalog-ui.js && ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron --check catalog.js && ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron --check grpc-client.js && ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron --check api-client.js && ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron --check synthesis-run.js
